skip_list: validator should be called with two arguments
validator should not be able to mutate other props
replace camelize with hyphenate to handle props key
events should not be props when component updating
should insert jobs in ascending order of job's id when flushing
should insert jobs after pre jobs with the same id
should insert pre jobs without ids first during flushing
jobs added during post flush are ordered correctly
nextTick should capture scheduler flush errors
jobs can be re-queued after an error
should prevent self-triggering jobs by default
should allow explicitly marked jobs to trigger itself
recursive jobs can only be queued once non-recursively
recursive jobs can only be queued once recursively
recursive jobs can't be re-queued by other jobs
jobs are de-duplicated correctly when calling flushPreFlushCbs
should not run stopped reactive effects
should pause tracking in error handler
errors in scheduler job with owner instance should be caught
initSlots: should normalize object slots (when value is null, string, array)
initSlots: should normalize object slots (when value is function)
initSlots: instance.slots should be set correctly (when vnode.shapeFlag is not SLOTS_CHILDREN)
updateSlots: instance.slots should be updated correctly (when slotType is null)
updateSlots: instance.slots should be update correctly (when vnode.shapeFlag is not SLOTS_CHILDREN)
should work with a function directive
should receive exposeProxy for closed instances
should not throw with unknown directive
error of slot function execution should not affect block tracking
flush: pre watcher in child component should not fire before parent update
flush: pre watcher watching props should fire before child update
flush: pre triggered in component setup should be buffered and called before mounted
flush: post watcher should fire after template refs updated

_categories.scheduler: Tests internal scheduler API directly, not renderer contract
_categories.directives: el binding in directives gets TestNode wrapper instead of raw element
_categories.vnode: Tests internal VNode normalization/cloning, not renderer
